metadata.description: Write Hebrew content indistinguishable from a native Israeli human. 8-layer system: Hebrew Mind, Linguistic Precision, Anti-Detection, Israeli Voice, Rhythm, Self-Audit, Soul, Versatility.

plugins.name: hebrew-ghostwriter
plugins.description: Hebrew-native content writer that produces text indistinguishable from work by a real Israeli writer. 16-word AI vocabulary blacklist, 6 content patterns, 10 Hebrew-specific AI tells, 5 Big No-Nos. Soul Layer with 20 authenticity techniques. Versatility Engine prevents cross-piece repetition (PNAS 2025 register-leveling defense). Generate, rewrite, or detect AI patterns in Hebrew text.
